name: Curried Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Mushrooms, dried; assorted (oyster, morel, porcini, etc)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dried mushrooms and boiling water in a bowl and set aside to soak.
2. Preheat a stockpot over medium heat for 1 minute, then spray it twice with vegetable oil. Add the leeks and sauté for about 3 minutes, stirring constantly until translucent.
3. Add the flour and curry powder. Stir with a wooden spoon until the leeks are well coated.
4. Add the milk and bouillon cubes. Raise the heat to high and cook just until bubbles begin to form around the edges.
5. Reduce the heat to low and whisk until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
6. Remove the reconstituted mushrooms from their soaking liquid, squeeze out excess moisture, and roughly chop. Add to the stockpot and cook for 1 minute more.
7. Stir in the sherry (if using). Garnish with chopped chervil.
